name: MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN
title: MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN
description: The MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN switch offers exceptional network performance with its 4 x 10 Gigabit Ethernet ports, allowing for ultra-fast data transfer speeds that meet the demands of modern networks. Designed for versatility, the device is ready to use straight out of the box with no extra modules required, making it an efficient and reliable solution for both home and business networks. Its extra Gigabit Ethernet port is dedicated to management, ensuring smooth control and monitoring of the switch without compromising data traffic. Whether you are expanding a data center or setting up a high-speed home network, this switch delivers robust performance for even the most bandwidth-intensive applications.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Network Switch
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN switch offers exceptional network performance with its 4 x 10 Gigabit Ethernet ports, allowing for ultra-fast data transfer speeds that meet the demands of modern networks. Designed for versatility, the device is ready to use straight out of the box with no extra modules required, making it an efficient and reliable solution for both home and business networks. Its extra Gigabit Ethernet port is dedicated to management, ensuring smooth control and monitoring of the switch without compromising data traffic. Whether you are expanding a data center or setting up a high-speed home network, this switch delivers robust performance for even the most bandwidth-intensive applications.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Networking Features
detailed_description.text: Powered by a dual-core ARM CPU and the robust Marvell Prestera 98DX2528 switch chip, the CRS304-4XG-IN is equipped to handle demanding network tasks. Its advanced networking features include port-to-port forwarding, broadcast storm control, MAC filtering, VLAN support, traffic mirroring, and bandwidth limitation capabilities. Additionally, the device supports Layer 3 hardware offloading for more efficient handling of complex network operations, making it an ideal solution for professional-grade networking environments that require speed, flexibility, and reliability. With these features, the switch can manage complex traffic patterns and ensure optimal performance for large-scale, high-density deployments like corporate networks or data centers.

detailed_description.heading: Dual OS and Versatile Power Options
detailed_description.text: The CRS304-4XG-IN can run two different operating systems, allowing users to choose between MikroTik's RouterOS V7 and SwitchOS, depending on the required network configuration. This flexibility ensures that the device can function both as a powerful switch and a basic router, covering a wide range of use cases. The device supports four power options: 2 x DC jacks, PoE-In, and a 2-pin terminal, making it convenient for various power configurations in any networking environment. These versatile power inputs provide redundancy and flexibility, ensuring that your network stays operational even if one power source fails, which is crucial for critical network setups.

detailed_description.heading: Durable, Efficient Design
detailed_description.text: Built with a durable and lightweight enclosure, the MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN is designed to withstand challenging environments while maintaining top performance. The device incorporates a massive heat sink for quiet, fanless operation, ensuring efficient cooling without noise. This fanless cooling system is particularly beneficial for installations in noise-sensitive environments like offices or homes. With multiple mounting options, including a DIN rail mount, this switch is flexible and adaptable to various installation scenarios. Its reliable build quality and efficient cooling make it suitable for extended use in demanding network conditions without the risk of overheating or performance degradation.

comments.name: JJ
comments.text: This item is as described and runs fairly cool for a fanless device. Very happy with this purchase.
